subject: style(hero): use fixed warm gradient for heading text
body:
Replace theme-dependent gradient (from-primary to-secondary) with fixed
warm copper-to-rose gradient. Caramellatte's primary/secondary are both
near-black, making the theme gradient nearly invisible against the cream
background. Fixed colors with dark: variants ensure readability on both
themes.

Light: amber-600 → rose-500 (copper to warm rose on cream)
Dark: amber-400 → rose-400 (lighter for dark background contrast)

Tags: ui, hero, gradient
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: css-framework-migration
Semver: patch
